history.content:
<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is lava (L), so moving forward is deadly. The cell to the east (right) is safe floor (.). Turning clockwise to face east will allow moving into that safe cell. This is the first step toward navigating around the lava to reach the goal at (row5, col6).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Estou na linha inferior, virado para cima. O objetivo O estĂ¡ Ă  esquerda e acima. A cĂ©lula diretamente Ă  minha frente Ă© um piso seguro. Vou mover para frente para iniciar o caminho.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,4) facing north (as indicated by the "^" symbol). The goal (O) is at (6,2). Directly in front (north) is a floor cell, but moving forward would lead to a dead end because from (6,4) the only left move goes to lava (6,3). Instead, a safe path is to turn left (counter-clockwise) to face west, then move west twice to (7,2), then turn north and move up to the goal. This avoids all lava. Therefore, my next action is to turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead at (5,3) is a floor cell (.), which is safe. The goal is at (4,4), reachable by moving north twice and then east once. Moving forward now will clear the first step toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. Directly ahead is a floor cell (.), which is safe. The goal (O) is located two cells away: one step north and then one step east. There are lava cells immediately to the left and right of the agent. The safest next move is to step forward onto the floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly to my right (east). My forward direction (north) is blocked by a wall. To reach the goal, I need to face east first by turning clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly in front of me, one cell ahead. I will move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
